title: Project Engineer (Renewable Contract) / Manufacturing Industry / West
description:
Our client is from Manufacturing Industry. Due to their current expansion plan, they are looking for a Project Engineer to join their team, in hopes of developing the current high performing team. They are located in the West.

Benefits Summary:

  • $upto 4,000 + Completion Bonuses + Company pick-up provision

Job Responsibilities:

  • Plan, coordinate, and deliver engineering projects in line with defined scope, timelines, and budget requirements.
  • Review technical drawings and specifications to ensure compliance with industry standards and project requirements.
  • Liaise with internal stakeholders, external vendors, and clients to ensure smooth project execution and delivery.
  • Track project progress, prepare status reports, and address technical or operational issues promptly.
  • Support sourcing, procurement, and coordination of equipment and materials required for projects.
  • Conduct site coordination and monitoring to ensure works are carried out according to plan and safety standards.

Requirements:

  • Min Diploma in Mechanical/Electrical or related engineering field studies or equivalent.
  • Min 3 years of relevant experience in project engineering.

  • Proficiency Microsoft project management tools will be advantageous.

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click APPLY NOW or email an updated copy of your resume/cv.

We regret that only shortlisted candidate will be notified.

Email: jobs@recruitpedia.sg

Recruitpedia Pte. Ltd.

EA License No. 19C9682

EA Reg. No. R23115553 (Lai Hor Yan)

postedCompany.description:
RecruitPedia is an innovative, efficacious recruitment solution provider headquartered in Singapore.

We are constantly expanding and our trained headhunting consultants are distinguished by their extensive international industry knowledge and experience. It will be our greatest honour to be able to guide you along the ever-changing job market and assist you step-by-step with any challenges you face along the way.

RecruitPedia believes that all our clients and candidates deserve excellent service and strives to be the best and trusted service provider.
